info.title: Asynkron.Jsome
info.description: A C# code generator that processes Swagger 2.0 JSON files and JSON Schema files to produce C# DTO classes and FluentValidation validators

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Asynkron.Jsome - Advanced Swagger 2.0 and JSON Schema Code Generator

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate C# code from a Swagger specification

arguments.name: swaggerFile
arguments.description: Path to the Swagger 2.0 JSON file to process
